session.user: Run `pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/ -x -v` and report results. Do NOT fix anything.

tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py .F
=================================== FAILURES =================================== _______________________ test_valid_objective_json_output _______________________
def test_valid_objective_json_output() -> None: """Test JSON output mode returns structured data with phases and summary.""" issue = _make_issue(100, "Objective: Test Feature", VALID_OBJECTIVE_BODY) fake_gh = FakeGitHubIssues(issues={100: issue}) runner = CliRunner()
result = runner.invoke( check_objective, ["100", "--json-output"], obj=_test_ctx(fake_gh=fake_gh, issues={100: issue}), )
assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" > output = json.loads(result.output) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
... [34 lines omitted] ...
s = 'Warning: --json-output is deprecated. Use \'erk json objective check\' instead.\n{"success": true, "issue_number": 10...iption": "Update docs", "phase": "Foundation", "status": "pending"}, "validation_errors": [], "all_complete": false}\n' > raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0) ../../_temp/uv-python-dir/cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu/lib/python3.13/json/decoder.py:363: JSONDecodeError FAILED tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py::test_valid_objective_json_output - json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0) !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! ========================= 1 failed, 1 passed in 2.65s ==========================
session.assistant:
pytest failed: 1 issue found
**File:** tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py
**Issue:** test_valid_objective_json_output
**Location:** Line 164
**Error:** `JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)`
**Root Cause:** The JSON output is being prepended with a deprecation warning message: ``` Warning: --json-output is deprecated. Use 'erk json objective check' instead. ```
This warning text appears before the JSON, which causes `json.loads()` to fail when trying to parse the output. The test expects pure JSON but receives the warning followed by JSON.
The actual output being parsed contains: ``` Warning: --json-output is deprecated. Use 'erk json objective check' instead. {"success": true, "issue_number": 100, ...} ```
